description:
Letter from Mūsā b. Abū S[ahl] (a.k.a. Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi), to be delivered to [...] al-Turjumān who is to forward it to the unknown addressee. In Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in both Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script. The content is difficult to decipher. 

There are ~3 further unrelated fragments under this shelfmark.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
